metadata.purpose: Deterministic handoff-readiness scoring. Measures whether a specialist can act from the packet alone — deliberately SEPARATE from MEDDPICC completeness, so an early-discovery opportunity with thin MEDDPICC can still be handoff-ready. Weights only; no company/product/transcript.

qualification_gap_penalty.purpose: Bounded reduction so the readiness score visibly reflects unresolved qualification gaps (a well-formed packet on a poorly-qualified deal is 'ready_with_gaps', not 97). Never drops an actionable packet below the ready_with_gaps floor by itself.
